Appearances:
Plaintiff The John Stewart Company is present. Represented by Felicia Chen.

Defendant Kenzi Robi is NOT present.
Attorney Charles Oshinuga appearing for defendant in full scope.

*Per report of Mr. Oshinuga, Defendnat is a paraplegic.* Per Plaintiff's Counsel dismissal to be filed.

The Judge Pro Tem , litigants and counsel confer for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed. The trial date of April 11, 2016 is vacated. (501/jpt)
